name: CatDog Puzzle
short_description: CatDog Puzzle - slide puzzle game. You need solve the puzzle as fast as you can.
detailed_description:
CatDog Puzzle - slide puzzle game. You need solve the puzzle as fast as you can.

Collect some cute cats and dogs.

Comes with:
More than 60+ pictures
3 difficulties (easy 3x3 medium 4x4 and hard 5x5 without numbers on pictures )
Nice music



Best time killer come and get it !!
